query:
-- Rinomina SL_SBACON in "Spezie Bacon"
UPDATE final_recipes 
SET name = 'Spezie Bacon', code = 'SPEZIE_BACON'
WHERE code = 'SL_SBACON';

-- Rinomina SL_SPULLED in "Spezie Pulled Pork"
UPDATE final_recipes 
SET name = 'Spezie Pulled Pork', code = 'SPEZIE_PULLED'
WHERE code = 'SL_SPULLED';

-- Rinomina SL_SRIBS in "Spezie Ribs"
UPDATE final_recipes 
SET name = 'Spezie Ribs', code = 'SPEZIE_RIBS'
WHERE code = 'SL_SRIBS';

-- Rinomina SL_SSOVRACOSCE in "Spezie Sovracosce"
UPDATE final_recipes 
SET name = 'Spezie Sovracosce', code = 'SPEZIE_SOVRACOSCE'
WHERE code = 'SL_SSOVRACOSCE';

-- Rinomina SL_STENDERS in "Spezie Tenders"
UPDATE final_recipes 
SET name = 'Spezie Tenders', code = 'SPEZIE_TENDERS'
WHERE code = 'SL_STENDERS';
